queries.question: Show me the type of rooms each house has.
queries.sql: SELECT Rooms.roomType  from Houses join Houses_Rooms on Houses.id = Houses_Rooms.houseId join Rooms on Houses_Rooms.roomId = Rooms.id   GROUP BY Houses_Rooms.roomId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Houses_Rooms.houseId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Houses)

queries.question: Show me the type of rooms each house has.
queries.sql: select houses.address , rooms.roomtype from Houses join Houses_Rooms on Houses.id = Houses_Rooms.houseId join Rooms on Houses_Rooms.roomId = Rooms.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?address ?roomtype WHERE {
  ?houses a :Houses .
  ?houses_rooms a :Houses_Rooms .
  ?houses_rooms p:hasHouses ?houses .
  ?rooms a :Rooms .
  ?houses_rooms p:hasRooms ?rooms .
  ?houses p:address ?address .
  ?rooms p:roomType ?roomtype .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the type of rooms each house has.
